zh.Chester-Le-Street, Durham, England: 英國達勒姆斯特勒-斯崔特

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Lumley於1457年1月28日出生在英國英格蘭達勒姆盧德沃斯時，他的父親George Lumley23歲，母親Elizabeth Thornton13歲。他於1477年之前與Elizabeth Plantagenet結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1487年11月13日在英國達勒姆盧姆利享年30歲，埋葬在英國達勒姆盧姆利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Lumley于1457年1月28日出生在英国英格兰達勒姆盧德沃斯时，他的父亲George Lumley23岁，母亲Elizabeth Thornton13岁。他于1477年之前与Elizabeth Plantagenet结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1487年11月13日在英国達勒姆盧姆利享年30岁，埋葬在英国達勒姆盧姆利。

nameMeanings.name: Lumley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Lumley, a place in County Durham, so named from Old English lum(m) ‘pool’ (see Lum 1) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

variants.name: Lum
meanings: English: habitational name from Lumb in Lancashire. In some instances the name may be topographic for someone who lived by a pool, Middle English lum(m).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 林 (see   Lin   1) and 藍 (see   Lan   1), based on their Cantonese pronunciations.

variants.name: Lemley
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of English   Lumley  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Lumley was born on 28 January 1457, in Ludworth, Durham, England, United Kingdom, his father, George Lumley, was 23 and his mother, Elizabeth Thornton, was 13. He married Elizabeth Plantagenet before 1477. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 13 November 1487, in Lumley, Durham, England, at the age of 30, and was buried in Lumley, Durham, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Lumley est né le 28 janvier 1457, à Ludworth, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, George Lumley, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Thornton, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Plantagenet avant 1477. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 13 novembre 1487, à Lumley, Durham, Angleterre, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterré à Lumley, Durham, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Lumley am 28. Januar 1457 in Ludworth, Durham, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater George Lumley 23 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Thornton 13. Er hat vor 1477 Elizabeth Plantagenet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 13. November 1487 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Lumley, Durham, England und wurde in Lumley, Durham, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Lumley è nato il il 28 gennaio 1457 nel Ludworth, Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, George Lumley, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Thornton, aveva 13 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Plantagenet prima del 1477. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 13 novembre 1487, nel Lumley, Durham, England, all'età di 30 anni, e fu sepolto a Lumley, Durham, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Lumleyが1457年1月28日にイギリスイギリスダルハムルドウオルスで生まれた時，父George Lumleyは23歳，母Elizabeth Thorntonは13歳であった。1477年以前にElizabeth Plantagenetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1487年11月13日にイギリスダルハムルムリーで30歳で死去し，イギリスダルハムルムリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Lumley(이)가 1457년 1월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 루드워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 George Lumley(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Thornton(은)는 13세였다. 그는 1477년 이전 Elizabeth Plantagenet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1487년 11월 13일 영국 뒤람 럼리에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 뒤람 럼리에 묻혔다.

pt.28 January 1457–13 November 1487: 28 de janeiro de 1457–13 de novembro de 1487
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Lumley nasceu em 28 de janeiro de 1457, em Ludworth, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, George Lumley, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Thornton, tinha 13 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Plantagenet antes 1477. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 13 de novembro de 1487, em Lumley, Durham, Inglaterra, com 30 anos, e foi sepultado em Lumley, Durham, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Lumley родился 28 января 1457 г. в местности лудворт, дурам, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени George Lumley было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Thornton, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Plantagenet перед 1477 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 13 ноября 1487 г. в местности лумли, дурам, Англия в возрасте 30 лет и был похоронен в местности лумли, дурам, Англия.

es.28 January 1457–13 November 1487: 28 de enero de 1457–13 de noviembre de 1487
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Lumley nació el 28 de enero de 1457, en Ludworth, Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, George Lumley, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Thornton, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Plantagenet antes de 1477. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 13 de noviembre de 1487, en Lumley, Durham, Inglaterra, a la edad de 30 años, y fue sepultado en Lumley, Durham, Inglaterra.
